flows: compito -> assegnazione — type=association; label="ha"; explanation="a task can have multiple assignments."
utente -> assegnazione — type=association; label="crea"; explanation="a user creates an assignment."
assegnazione -> coordinata — type=association; label="collocata"; explanation="an assignment is located at a coordinate."
assegnazione -> utentecompito — type=association; label="ha"; explanation="an assignment has a user task."
emergenza -> assegnazione — type=association; label="crea"; explanation="an emergency creates an assignment."
utente -> token — type=association; label="riceve"; explanation="a user receives a token."
token -> assegnazione — type=association; label="utilizza"; explanation="a token is used to create an assignment."
utente -> creaassegnazione(args)
assegnazione -> creacompito(args)
assegnazione -> creaemergenza(args)
assegnazione -> creautentecompito(args)
assegnazione -> collocata(coordinata)
assegnazione -> ha(compito)
assegnazione -> ha(utentecompito)
assegnazione -> ha(token)
the diagram models a system for managing tasks, emergencies, and user assignments.
users can create assignments, which are associated with tasks, emergencies, and coordinates.
tokens are used to create assignments.
the system
start -> utente autenticato? — type=transition; label="no"; explanation="if the user is not authenticated"
start -> click "visualizza emergenze" — type=transition; label="si"; explanation="if the user is authenticated"
utente autenticato? -> emergenze disponibili? — type=transition; label="no"; explanation="if emergencies are not available"
utente autenticato? -> nessuna emergenza — type=transition; label="si"; explanation="if no emergencies are available"
click "visualizza emergenze" -> emergenze disponibili? — type=transition; label="si"; explanation="if emergencies are available"
emergenze disponibili? -> visualizza emergenze — type=transition; label="si"; explanation="if emergencies are available"
emergenze disponibili? -> nessuna emergenza — type=transition; label="no"; explanation="if emergencies are not available"
the diagram models the process of visualizing emergencies within an application.
the process starts with a check for user authentication.
if the user is not authenticated, they are prompted to log in.
if the user is authenticated, they are asked to click "visualize emergencies".
if emergencies are available, they are visualized.
if no emergencies are available, a message indicating this is displayed.
start -> utente registrato? — type=transition; label="si"; explanation="user is registered"
start -> utente registrato? — type=transition; label="no"; explanation="user is not registered"
utente registrato? -> inserisci dati login — type=transition; label="si"
utente registrato? -> registrazione utente — type=transition; label="no"
inserisci dati login -> dati corretti? — type=transition; label="si"
inserisci dati login -> dati corretti? — type=transition; label="no"
dati corretti? -> home — type=transition; label="si"
the diagram models the login/registration process for a user.
the process starts with a check if the user is registered. if not, the user is registered.
if the user is registered, the user is prompted to enter login details.
the login details are then checked for correctness.
if the details are correct, the user is taken to the home page.
if the details are incorrect, the user is prompted to re-enter the login details.
coordinatore autenticato -> inserisci dettagli — type=transition; label="si"; explanation="passa alla fase successiva se autenticato"
coordinatore autenticato -> inserisci dettagli — type=transition; label="no"; explanation="errore: coordinatore non autenticato"
inserisci dettagli -> informazioni complete? — type=decision; label="si"; explanation="verifica se le informazioni sono complete"
inserisci dettagli -> informazioni complete? — type=decision; label="no"; explanation="richiedi di aggiornare i dettagli"
informazioni complete? -> crea emergenza — type=transition; label="si"; explanation="crea l'emergenza"
informazioni complete? -> aggiorna dettagli — type=transition; label="no"; explanation="aggiorna i dettagli mancanti"
aggiorna dettagli -> informazioni complete? — type=decision; label="si"; explanation="verifica se i dettagli sono completi"
aggiorna dettagli -> informazioni complete? — type=decision; label="no"; explanation="richiedi di aggiornare i dettagli"
the diagram models the process of creating an emergency.
the process starts with a coordinated user authenticating.
if the coordinator is not authenticated, an error is triggered.
if the coordinator is authenticated, the user is prompted to enter details.
the system checks if the entered information is complete.
if the information is not complete, the user is asked to update it.
if the information is complete, the emergency is created.
the process repeats until the information is complete.
click "visualizza emergenza" -> coordinatore autenticato? — type=transition; label="click"; explanation="user clicks 'visualize emergency'";
coordinatore autenticato? -> seleziona compito — type=transition; label="no"; explanation="user not authenticated";
coordinatore autenticato? -> volontario assegnato? — type=transition; label="si"; explanation="user authenticated";
seleziona compito -> volontario assegnato? — type=transition; label="no"; explanation="voluntary assigned?";
seleziona compito -> rimovi volontario — type=transition; label="si"; explanation="voluntary assigned?";
volontario assegnato? -> errore — type=transition; label="no"; explanation="voluntary not assigned";
the process starts with the user clicking "visualize emergency".
if the coordinator is not authenticated, an error is displayed.
if the coordinator is authenticated, the system checks if a volunteer is assigned.
if a volunteer is assigned, the system removes the volunteer.
if a volunteer is not assigned, an error is displayed.
client -> server : post /login
server -> database : select * from utenti where email = ?
database -> server : user.length == 0
server -> server : bcrypt.comparesync(password, user.password)
server -> server : genera jwt + token jwt
server -> database : update tokens set revoked = true where id = ?
database -> server : risultato update
server -> client : insert into tokens (id, id)
server -> client : risultato insert
client -> server : risposta (token o errore)
client sends post /login request to server.
server queries the database for a user with the provided email.
database checks if the user length is 0.
server compares the password using bcrypt.
server generates a jwt token.
server updates the tokens table in the database.
server inserts a new token into the tokens table.
server sends a response (token or error) back to the client.
the diagram models the login flow, including user authentication, token generation, and database interaction.
the diagram highlights the use of bcrypt for password hashing and jwt for token generation.
a potential error path is indicated by the "no" branch from the "user.length == 0" condition, suggesting an error response is sent if the user is not found.
client -> server: post /nuovocompito;
server -> database: insert into compiti;
database -> server: result;
server -> logger: logger.error(error);
server -> client: errore http (400/401/500);
server -> client: risposta (successo o nessun compito);
the diagram models the process of creating a new account.
the client sends a post request to the server.
the server attempts to insert the new account into the database.
if the insertion is successful, the server returns a success response.
if an error occurs during the insertion, the server logs the error and returns an http error response.
client -> server : post /terminaemergenza; label="terminaemergenza"; explanation="client sends a request to terminate an emergency."
server -> database : verifytoken(); label="verifytoken"; explanation="server calls the verifytoken method."
database -> server : esequi update; label="esequi update"; explanation="database executes an update query."
database -> server : result (numero emergenze terminate); label="result"; explanation="database returns the number of terminated emergencies."
server -> client : [result > 0] ; label="result > 0"; explanation="server checks if the result is greater than 0."
server -> client : { message: "x emergenza terminata" }; label="message"; explanation="server sends a success message."
server -> client : [result <= 0] ; label="result <= 0"; explanation="server checks if the result is less than or equal to 0."
server -> client : { message: "nessuna emergenza terminata" }; label="message"; explanation="server sends an error message."
client sends a post request to /terminaemergenza.
server calls verifytoken().
database executes an update query.
database returns the number of terminated emergencies (result).
server checks if the result is greater than 0.
if the result is greater than 0, server sends a success message: "x emergenza terminata".
if the result is less than or equal to 0, server sends an error message: "nessuna emergenza terminata".
the diagram models the interaction between a client, a server, and a database to terminate an emergency.
the server validates the token and updates the database to reflect the termination.
the diagram highlights the different outcomes based on the number of terminated emergencies.
validations: utente registrato? — branch="si", target=inserisci dati login
dati corretti? — branch="no", target=inserisci dati login
informazioni complete? — type=decision; label="si"; explanation="le informazioni sono complete"
informazioni complete? — type=decision; label="no"; explanation="le informazioni non sono complete"
"user.length == 0" — si (true) -> continues to the next step; no (false) -> sends an error response.
